evals.prompt: I need compare certificates for old-cert.pem and new-cert.pem.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-compare skill for this certificate compare request and produce the documented result for old-cert.pem and new-cert.pem.
expectations: Selects certificate-compare for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_compare.
Keeps the response focused on comparing two SSL/TLS certificates to determine if they are identical or different.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused certificate compare workflow for old-cert.pem and new-cert.pem; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-compare skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects certificate-compare instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
